g.aria-label: Study Time and Test Scores with 1 series and 19 points, overall minimum X 1, overall maximum X 10, overall minimum Y 48, overall maximum Y 95. To navigate the chart, use Enter to move into the list of points or use the arrow keys to navigate the chart information.

TestScore19 points, minimum X 1, maximum X 10, minimum Y 48, maximum Y 95, 1 of 1 series. To navigate the list of series, use Enter to move into the list of points for that series, use Shift + Enter to return to the chart information. End of list order.

(1, 48), 1 of 19 points. To navigate the list of points, use the arrow keys to move between points in value order on the X axis, use Page Up or Page Down to move between points by value order on the Y axis, use Shift + Enter to return to the series list.
(10, 95), 19 of 19 points. End of X value order. End of Y value order.

rect.aria-label: X axis shows Study Hours and ranges from 1 to 10
Y axis shows Test Score and ranges from 45 to 100
